message:
feat(config): add latency-tracking and latency-tracking-info-percentiles CONFIG SET support

Implement Redis 7.0+ latency tracking configuration parameters:

- latency-tracking (yes/no): enables/disables the extended latency
  tracking subsystem, stored in ServerState
- latency-tracking-info-percentiles: configurable percentile list
  (space-separated floats 0-100) for latency histogram reporting
- Default: tracking enabled with p50/p99/p99.9 percentiles
- Both parameters validate input and persist via static_override_updates
  for CONFIG REWRITE support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
